title: LSASS Credential Dump via Procdump or Taskmgr
description: Detects dumping of LSASS process memory for credential harvesting using procdump.exe, Task Manager, or direct process access. Dumping LSASS captures NTLM hashes, Kerberos tickets, and cleartext credentials from memory. A critical indicator of credential theft.
falsepositives: Authorized crash dump collection by system administrators
